title: STAT+: A provocative proposal asks the FDA to let some AI devices on the market without review
description: A provocative new proposal has offered the FDA a way to let a broad swath of potentially risky AI devices flood the market.
content: A provocative new proposal has offered the FDA a way to let a broad swath of potentially risky AI devices flood the market.
